name: The Iron Crown
primer: The Iron Crown is a land of Floating sky-islands. The people follow Machine-god technofaith. Their greatest achievement: Mapped the planar boundaries. Power rests with The General — Order through strength. Discipline is law.. In the shadows, The Resistance — Freedom fighters or terrorists — depends who you ask.. The economy runs on Gold-standard mercantile trade. Society is defined by Wealth-based social mobility.
